attractions_found: T's TanTan (Tokyo Station) — Tokyo's famous vegan ramen counter with rich, creamy broths that even non-vegans love.
Ain Soph. Journey (Shinjuku) — refined, creative vegan dining with elegant set menus and decadent desserts.
Nagi Shokudo (Shibuya) — cozy, homestyle vegan Japanese and hearty daily plates in a laid-back neighborhood spot.
